programme.desc: The second visit is to the pet-friendly Dog in a Doublet in Peterborough, where Della McGinn's passion for animals comes a close second to husband John's passion for food

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien turns car seats into a three-piece suite during a trip to Leyland, while Henry Cole repurposes an overhead light into a fashionable light box

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin assists Joanna and Scott, who met 18 years ago in southern Spain while they were on a golfing trip, and are now searching for a home on the Costa Blanca

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the West Midlands with three children to find a holiday home in Tenerife, tracking down five properties within their budget of £185,000

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer continue to celebrate two decades of the property programme by looking back at the times they have been asked to search for million-pound houses. But with a big budget comes big expectations, as proved by Steve and Dee, who had a list of 34 requirements and a tiny search area. Claire was the programme's youngest ever house-hunter. Needing full-time help due to having cerebral palsy, she wanted an accessible but glamorous central London pad. Meanwhile, Bermondsey boy Matt and fiancee Tricia hoped to start a family in their dream rural Kentish home with scenic views

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics return to share their opinions on shows including (Un)well, When Harry Met Sally, Countdown, Britain's Got Talent, Mary Berry's Simple Comforts, Elephant Hospital, BBC news reports on quarantine, and young people and Covid, and ITV news coverage of Brexit

programme.title: Council House Britain
programme.desc: The work of frontline council workers in Southwark, south London, one of the biggest housing associations in the country. Housing officer Cheryl is chasing down a tenant who owes more than £10,000 in rent. She suspects he could be subletting but needs to be sure before she begins the eviction process. Pest controller Andy climbs into a loft space that has been invaded by pigeons, which can cause enormous damage, and an elderly woman with cancer is desperate for her and her husband to find somewhere better than the unsuitable bedsit they currently call home

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: James Blunt, Alison Hammond, Alex Jones and Joe Sugg take part in the charity culinary challenge, under the watchful eye of presenters Sandi Toksvig and Noel Fielding, and judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith. For the signature round, they must prepare a batch of decorated traybakes, while the technical challenge involves a classic British staple. Finally, for the Showstopper, they must create a scene out of biscuits depicting what they wanted to be when they grew up

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Compilation of reports on store cupboard staples, including Kate Quilton taking a look at the secrets behind peanut butter's long shelf life, solving the mysteries of Marmite's famously divisive flavour, and discovering if it is safe to feed cats dog food and vice versa. Jimmy Doherty travels to Sri Lanka to discover why lentils are sold split rather than whole, and Matt Tebbutt witnesses anchovy fishing off the coast of Italy

programme.title: Lodgers for Codgers
programme.desc: The chances of a 25 to 35-year-old person owning a home have halved in the last 20 years, while millions of over-sixties are sitting on empty rooms, so here young and old tackle Britain's housing crisis by trialling a unique solution - moving in together. In this third instalment, dog groomer Liah-Rose moves home and business to Reading and pensioner landlords Carolynne and David's high-octane lifestyle. Meanwhile, Jake from Middlesbrough heads for 61-year-old Christene's place in Pontefract, West Yorkshire

programme.title: The Black Full Monty
programme.desc: Documentary going on the road with The Chocolate Men, Britain's first all-black touring strip dancing group. Filmed during their 2018 nationwide tour, the film meets the managers Louis and Dante - who thought up the idea after hosting a Magic Mike-themed show - and explores what motivates each of the dancers to bare all night after night

programme.title: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: With passenger numbers sky rocketing, airports and planes are increasingly becoming pressurised environments. Footage captured by people who were there highlights some of the most dramatic, extraordinary and unusual moments that UK passengers have experienced. From terrible behaviour in the terminal and tantrums on the tarmac to full-scale brawls on board, the programme hears from the people who were involved. Expert analysis from industry insiders and psychologists explains why people behave how they do on flights from hell

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five cooks compete for the £1,000 prize in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and keen basketball player Ken Oputa is the first to host, inviting his guests to turn up in sportswear fancy dress. He hopes his Double Dribble mushrooms and Slam Dunk salmon will prove to be winning ingredients

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer Erika Sager hosts the second dinner party of the week on board her boat in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and invites her guests to dress up as pirates. Despite the unconventional setting, her rivals are all impressed by the standard of her food and hospitality

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Sarah Brice hosts the third dinner party in Kingston upon Thames, hoping to impress her guests with her own take on dishes including prawns, lamb and chocolate mousse. Ken Oputa tries to make an impression on the female contestants with his romantic poetry, but finds Erika Sager switches her attentions to his rival Jamie Baker

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Photographer Jamie Baker hosts the fourth party in London, and his ambitious menu of langoustine and crab ravioli, herb crusted rack of lamb, and milloux of chocolate - combined with his choice of evening entertainment - go down well, until an unexpected turn of events scuppers his plans

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Retired golfer David Witcher hosts the final evening in Kingston upon Thames, south-west London, and hopes to impress with an American-themed menu, including Wyoming slow-cooked ribs and Louisiana seafood chowder. After dinner, he entertains his guests with a bucking bronco, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mother-of-two Currina seeks a holiday home along Spain's northern Costa Cálida. With a budget of £65,000 and her best friend Tracey by her side for support, expert Jean Johansson is called upon to pull out all the stops in locating five possible properties. Whether any will prove the perfect one for Currina remains to be seen

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Renuka Joseph is looking for a holiday home where she can entertain family and friends and relax with her husband Clarence. She's originally from Sri Lanka and has chosen the Costa del Sol as her perfect spot because the beaches remind her of home. She's brought her best friend Shanez along to help, so Jasmine Harman shows them five apartments in and around Estepona for her £80,000 budget

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at the Torcroft Boutique B&B in Torquay, south Devon, where Phil and Sharon Hobson hope their added extras will help win over their rivals

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to the seaside resort of Southport, where Harry comes across some old ammunition crates that he decides to turn into pieces of furniture

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's parents draw attention to Robert's strange eating habits, making him feel self-conscious every time he sits down for a meal - so Debra devises a plan to cure him once and for all. Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Brad Garrett star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: An invitation to spend Easter with the Barones spurs the MacDougalls to unite with the family over a 500-piece jigsaw puzzle - until Ray and Pat upset the apple cart by indulging in more than their fair share of bonding. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps a couple with £100,000 to spend to relocate to the Charente in western France, where they hope to lead a more relaxed life in the countryside

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Katrin and Thomas from London search for a holiday home in the countryside of inland Malaga, where they hope to one day live permanently and enjoy the Spanish lifestyle

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Compilation of reports on store cupboard staples, including Kate Quilton taking a look at the secrets behind peanut butter's long shelf life, solving the mysteries of Marmite's famously divisive flavour, and discovering if it is safe to feed cats dog food and vice versa. Jimmy Doherty travels to Sri Lanka to discover why lentils are sold split rather than whole, and Matt Tebbutt witnesses anchovy fishing off the coast of Italy

programme.title: George Clarke's National Trust Unlocked
programme.desc: George visits the magnificent and meticulously crafted country retreat of Standen in West Sussex - one of the best examples of the Arts and Crafts design movement to be found anywhere in the world. He discovers a masterpiece of Gothic Revival architecture at Tyntesfield in Somerset, with its acres of flower-filled terraces, and unleashes a medieval catapult at Corfe Castle in Dorset, an iconic ruin who's first stone was laid almost a millennium ago, before risking vertigo with his trusty companion Loki at the highest point on England's south coast - the famous Golden Cap

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the importance of the father-son relationship and the potential consequences and difficulties when this relationship is not a positive one. Frontline officers talk frankly about their experiences of how the breakdown of this pivotal formative experience can lead to young men perpetuating cycles of violence, lacking confidence, or struggling with mental health problems

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant and boxing ring girl Chloe sits down with 'geezer' Anthony, who believes his cheeky wink can charm any woman. Actor Josh seeks a leading lady, but as a dwarf he has struggled to find someone who won't judge him on his height. His date is housing support officer Lori, who at four foot 11 has also found love a challenge. Also, dedicated father Rob is paired with former Butlin's Redcoat Donna. How will she react when he reveals he has 10 children?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: An episode following the stories of fathers and sons and the bonds between them. John is rushed into St George's with a life threatening abdominal aortic aneurism. As the doctors work out whether they can save the 77-year-old's life with emergency surgery, his only son discusses the prospect of losing his father. Elsewhere, cameras follow Jamie, whose motorbike collided with a car on a motorway slip road on his way to work, and carpenter Noel arrives in A&E after partially amputating his thumb

programme.title: Inside the Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of the British Army soldiers who defuse bombs in the UK, providing an insight into the training they receive at 'Bomb School' in Bicester. Sergeant Alex 'Swansea' Hughes is called out at night to a woodland near Clitheroe, where a dog walker has found an explosive dating back to the Second World War. Swansea must make it safe by taking it to a large open field and blowing it up. Sergeant Sam Jones - a veteran of Afghanistan - has seen a spike in the number of calls the bomb squad receive in the UK due to the craze of magnet fishing. Treasure hunters hurl large industrial weights into lakes and canals but often get more than they bargained for, pulling out all manner of potentially deadly explosives including mortar bombs and hand grenades, with one man causing a major incident by disposing of a grenade in a dustbin on the industrial estate where he works

programme.title: 100 Vaginas
programme.desc: Documentary artist Laura Dodsworth photographs 100 women and interviews 18 of the participants, aged between 19 and 77, and asks them about how their vagina has shaped their lives. They share their experiences of starting periods and pubic hair grooming, the trauma of rape and FGM, and the joy of orgasms

programme.title: Superhuman Summer: The Paralympic Rewind
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas and Jonnie Peacock present a celebration of some of the most memorable moments from the 2012 and 2016 Paralympic Games in London and Rio. With guests including Clare Balding, Ade Adepitan, Alex Brooker, Adam Hills and Josh Widdicombe, as well as members of Britain's Paralympics team

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver pulls out all the stops with his 'totally bonkers sausage and mash pie'. It's not a pie with mash on the side, or even a pie with mash on the top - Jamie uses golden mashed potatoes instead of pastry to encase a beautiful leek, sausage and apple stew. Jamie also gives Britain's favourite takeaway, fish and chips, a home makeover that involves no deep-frying, making it both safer and healthier for the family. With help from his son Buddy, Jamie encases the fish in golden breadcrumbs that are shot through with smoky bacon, before serving it with smoked paprika potato wedges, mashed-up green veg and a light minty sauce

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace wrestles with a newly wed dilemma - she only has two tickets for The Nutcracker on Christmas Eve, and cannot decide whether to take Will or Leo. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen falls in love with a restaurant owner, but he fails to call her after their date. Will and Jack join a gay football team. American comedy, guest starring Andy Garcia (Ocean's Eleven), with Eric McCormack, Sean Hayes and Megan Mullally

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part one of four. Karen plays Cupid for Will, who soon finds his 'hot and handsome' date is a self-conscious misfit. Meanwhile, Grace worries her extrovert masseuse Julie may have more than a passing interest in her. American sitcom, guest starring Rosanna Arquette and Dan Futterman

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Kady's soccer team complains that Janet is pushing them too hard, so Michael steps in and replaces her as coach - but his easy-going approach fails to fill them with the will to win

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael receives advice from Junior on how to handle Janet's office persona, while Claire tries to convince Kady that ET is not as scary as she thinks

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: The documentary about welfare recipients follows people with big dreams of getting back into work, including an ex-soldier whose life was turned upside down after a false accusation of theft. Now he is rebuilding his life and saving as much money as he can as he tries to turn his interest in photography into a career as a photojournalist. The film also features a 48-year-old grandmother who dreams of getting back into security work, and a former salesman with a dream of making it in the music business

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: The documentary follows 34-year-old Shaun from Stockton-on-Tees who has been on and off benefits - and in and out of trouble with the police - since leaving school, and is finally trying to turn his life around. Leon from Ashton-under-Lyme is fed up of only finding jobs with zero-hours contracts but cannot afford the transport to look further afield, while Knowsley-based cab driver Mark has not worked since having his licence revoked following an angina attack two years ago. Now he struggles to manage the stairs to his flat and needs moving to a new home

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester, where a landlord is owed £8,000 in rent arrears and has already called for police back-up. As tempers rise, the pair must find a way to handle a situation that is spiralling dangerously out of control. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase £3,000 owed to a firm of letting agents, before tracking a debtor who was accidentally over-paid for a job. Plus, Stewart and Iain face an eviction that is set to test their patience

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly £2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost £3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly £6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes £6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than £7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a £400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: In Huddersfield, officers are in pursuit of a van driver who smashed his van into a parked car before fleeing, while Bob and Dan pepper spray a suspect who is not keen on being handcuffed. Chris and Chris go after a stolen car whose driver gets too close to some railings, and the Operational Support Unit deal with a suspected heroin user carrying a number of bank cards and needles

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan and Tom have their hands full with a driver who is four times over the limit and still refuses to come quietly even when he's bundled into the back of the police car. Sophie and Adie stop a carload of lads at five in the morning and the driver is over the limit, but it's what's down his trousers that is more of a concern

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Dipi is stunned when Shane finally comes clean and admits the truth, while Mackenzie is outraged to learn that Richie was the one who gave Shane his first taste of drugs

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Colby's effort to provide Bella with a false alibi backfires when her level of panic and anxiety before her interrogation intensifies. Jasmine is on a path of redemption

programme.title: Aldi vs Lidl: Supermarket Wars
programme.desc: The success of the two German-owned supermarket chains, investigating their canny marketing ploys and aggressive sales techniques in their battle for domination. Insiders reveal the secrets behind both supermarkets' success and how they compete with their rivals, while the programme highlights the most tempting cut-price products that are the key to their success

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Surreal artists David and Carol, who have been left with a shortfall in their UK pension after living abroad for years, try to sell some of their work at a market in Fuengirola. Campsite dweller and DJ Noel - who has a 10-year plan to buy a bar - gears up to spin tunes at his biggest gig of the year, the National San Juan festival. Cameras also follow former Playboy bunny Michelle and her husband Tony, who have taken advantage of the Costa's roasting heat and bought an awning company

programme.title: It's Your Fault I'm Fat
programme.desc: Fifteen-year-old Rosie wants to lose weight to get into her prom dress, but her healthy living plan is made harder when lockdown is announced

programme.title: Angels & Demons (2009)
programme.desc: Academic adventurer Robert Langdon is called in by the Vatican to deal with a crisis. Pope Pius XVI has died suddenly and the four cardinals in line to be his successor have all been abducted by a mysterious sect that is threatening to murder them. As he searches for the kidnapped clerics, Langdon discovers the cult has an even more horrific plan in mind involving a stolen canister of anti-matter. Ron Howard takes the reins once again for the sequel to The Da Vinci Code, with Tom Hanks, Ewan McGregor, Ayelet Zurer Stellan Skarsgard and Pierfrancesco Favino

programme.desc: The best friends are horrified to discover a surprising connection has developed between their parents. Jack rebounds from his break-up by starting a new relationship, and Karen faces a tough choice between her husband and her lover. Eric McCormack and Debra Messing star

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen fumes when Jack is befriended by her rival Lorraine, while Will and Grace try to repair their flagging friendship by taking part in a competitive night of board games with friends. Guest starring Minnie Driver, with Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is far from impressed when Jack's childhood babysitter moves in with them, while Grace suffers an identity crisis. Starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing, with guest stars Demi Moore and Rosanna Arquette

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The children tease Michael about his age, so he pretends he has injured his back to gain sympathy, and to shame them into being nice to him

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: People struggling to live on state welfare in Wales, including a piano teacher with a very rare heart condition who has a permanent IV line in her chest for self-administering drugs, but who continues to give lessons despite being too sick to work. Plus, a mother of five funding her children's singing lessons and a woman left struggling to support her family after changes in the benefit rules

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: People getting by on benefits in the Midlands. Thirty-year-old Derby man James believes his bipolar disorder prevents him having a regular job His dream is to be a full-time entertainer - will his alter ego Mrs Plonker help him into spotlight? Plus, a part-time cleaner who wants to become a model and a former publican whose type 2 diabetes is hindering her search for work

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Vic experience one of the most violent cases they have ever faced when they are confronted by an angry older gentleman. Later, the pair chase £3,000 owed for an unwanted car engine, but the debtor is convinced that he knows the law and the agents' jobs better than they do. Meanwhile, Steve and Ben face a dilemma in north London, where a tenant is being evicted for rent arrears, and in south London, Paul and Steve have no option but to force a dramatic entry into a property

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: One-off edition in which the High Court enforcement agents are caught in the crossfire of three bitter family disputes, including a debt-dodging man who pushes his panic-stricken mother over the edge. Plus, a family booted onto the streets at night by a ruthless aunt, and a man who won't engage with the agents and loses his car

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Steve have an emotional confrontation in Berkshire when a tearful woman accuses her landlord of fleecing her for extra rent, while Brian and Del travel to Luton to recover £4,500 owed by an elusive debtor who has been giving them the runaround

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The police interception unit attempt to stop a dangerous driver, resulting in multiple cars and a helicopter being called into action. Dog handler Duncan assists armed response officers in Leeds city centre in the early hours following reports of a man carrying a pistol, while in Wakefield, a repeat offender who has been caught drink driving in the past thinks he knows how to beat the system

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A gang of burglars breaks into a house and takes the keys to luxury cars. After the thieves flee in three stolen vehicles, multiple teams hunt them down with the police chopper. The first burglar is caught after a lengthy pursuit of a stolen Mercedes, which he abandons before running straight into the path of waiting officers. Once the occupants of a second stolen Merc are apprehended by the chopper team, Ben and Warren go after the third vehicle - which they are stunned to witness burst into flames

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi takes Shane to the station for formal questioning and Mackenzie is so overwhelmed that she decides not to apply as a candidate for the youth advisor position

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Babies 24/7: Maternity Ward
programme.desc: After the traumatic birth of her first-born son, 36-year-old Michelle is determined to have an easier time with her second, but scans reveal their baby could be bigger than average

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programme.desc: Revenue inspector Scott is on the lookout for fare evaders attempting to force their way through the ticket barriers. Alex and Baba join forces with the police in a sting operation along a busy stretch on one of the city's busiest bus routes

Action thriller, with Channing Tatum, Jamie Foxx, Maggie Gyllenhaal and James Woods

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: Michael tries to provide a confidence-booster for Jay, who is feeling inadequate following a meeting with a former cheerleader they knew at school. Meanwhile, Junior gets trapped in the girls' locker room. American comedy, starring Damon Wayans

programme.title: My Wife and Kids
programme.desc: The Kyle and Tyler families compete against each nother in a bowling tournament, and Junior develops a crush on his opponents' daughter

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: North West claimants struggling against medical and psychological issues while getting by on benefits. Blackpool martial arts enthusiast Mark hopes to get back into paid employment after being dismissed for breaking a colleague's nose, while Liverpool couple Clive and Sheila want to tie the knot on a benefits budget. Autistic Fleetwood man William struggles to get round due to a bad back and varicose veins. He needs a mobility scooter but has benefits have been cut

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Claimants from across the generations, including a 32-year-old former fisherman and his 20-year-old partner who need a bigger home for their five-strong family, and a 57-year-old former welder now struggling to find permanent employment. Plus, a Hastings woman who, after 10 years on the dole, has started to claim her pension and is living comfortably - and now she has a dream of breaking into the music industry

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, father-and-son team Del and Dael Anglin face death threats from a debtor's father, after arriving at a property to collect a debt of over £3,500. Meanwhile, in east London, two agents are confronted with a tenant who claims to have had no prior warning that he is being evicted from his tiny bedsit. Del and Brian try to recover £6,000 owed by a London hotel to a catering supply company, and Paul and Steve must tackle a difficult eviction

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In north London, agents Del and Dael chase nearly £2,000 owed by a printing company, but the owner denies the debt and starts getting physical. Meanwhile, Stewart and Elmor find themselves caught up in a personal dispute when they try to collect rent arrears from a barber's shop, and in Bedfordshire, Del and Brian try to recover almost £2,000 owed to a funeral director. Stewart and Vic track down a debt of £5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost £8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect £3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost £2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly £3,500 from a businessman in west London

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay £2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover £45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a £4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dan and Tom have their hands full with a driver who is four times over the limit and still refuses to come quietly even when he's bundled into the back of the police car. Sophie and Adie stop a carload of lads at five in the morning and the driver is over the limit, but it's what's down his trousers that is more of a concern

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves in a tense stand-off with suspected drug dealers who could be armed, with German shepherd Tia sent in to search and discovering more than the unit bargained for. Steve has to deal with two teens, one who has crashed a stolen car, and the other who has been involved in a bar brawl, while Kev is poised to take out a car with a stinger

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nicolette admits to Jane that she is still hurt by her mother's reaction to her coming out, while Yashvi and Levi realise the way to get answers is if they find Shane's dealer

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Dean continues to avoid Ziggy as her suspicion mounts and Colby has to make a change of plan when a warrant is issued for the missing Bella and Nikau

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: Geologist Tom Backhouse investigates sinkholes caused by collapsed mine shafts, including one in Gosforth that opened up in front of a flat and led down to an abandoned coal mine. In Bury St Edmunds, a homeowner reveals how he is stuck in an unsellable house that is surrounded by sinkholes

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Enforcement officers Wayne and Dan continue their mission to identify the gang responsible for one of the biggest fly tips in Cardiff, more determined than ever to catch their prey. Environmental health officer Suzanne pays a visit to a takeaway restaurant in Worcester, and a London canal side is the scene of a battle between council enforcers and a waste-loving artist who has hoarded mountains of rubbish

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Nick Wallis turns his attention to violence on the streets of Britain that is fuelled by drink or drugs, and finds out how technological advances are helping to fight crime and secure convictions. In Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, a CCTV operator spots a man being punched unconscious after escaping a mass brawl and does her best to keep track of the assailant and direct the police to him. There is also footage of a fight in which a man is knocked to the floor and a woman wearing stilettos stamps on his face, and an incident outside a burger bar escalates into a relentless and violent assault

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Judy enlists the help of Allie, Boomer and Ruby to contact her father, while an increasingly volatile Allie struggles to keep her distance from Ferguson, leading to a confrontation

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. Spoof spy adventure, with Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Mimi Rogers, Michael York and Robert Wagner

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A famous rock star is acquitted of raping a fan after the victim's claims are rejected. Logan and Briscoe decide to investigate further, and discover the musician's pleasant reputation does not quite match his personality. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baby is found dead in his cot, and reports indicate he was poisoned. All the evidence pins the blame on a British au pair employed by the parents, but she claims the infant's death was a result of the mother's negligence. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe, Curtis, McCoy and Kincaid witness the execution of a criminal they helped bring to justice, but the event culminates in personal tragedies for each of them

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A decomposed skeleton is unearthed on a construction site and identification proves troublesome for Stone. The deceased is eventually revealed to be a man who disappeared years earlier and was presumed murdered. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green track down a disturbed woman who has not only murdered a young mother and stolen her five-day-old son, but also managed to convince her own husband that the baby is really theirs. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady look into the murder of Carl Mullaly, who had recently been profiled on HardFocus, a magazine programme that identifies sex offenders. The only witness is an eight-year-old girl and detectives soon make an arrest, but learn the tabloid talk show may have been more involved than it initially appeared

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Marine suspected of murdering a girl is killed in Iraq, and a search of his personal belongings reveals her body. Most members of the team believe they have found conclusive evidence of his guilt - but Gibbs suspects there is more to the situation than meets the eye

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony is infected with a deadly virus sent through the post by shadowy figures who demand the details of a long-closed case be made public in exchange for the antidote. McGee and Gibbs set out to identify the culprits and find a cure for the disease. Michael Weatherly and Mark Harmon star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. The team reels in the wake of the terrorist attack, but tries to avenge Kate's death by collecting as much information as possible on Ari before he does any more damage. Meanwhile, Gibbs learns one of his old flames has been named as the new NCIS director

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sara Carter begs Gibbs to investigate her mother's murder, as she believes the local authorities have convicted the wrong man. Abby is awarded a dinner reservation for two to a new five-star restaurant in an igloo, and has to decide which co-worker deserves to go with her. Mark Harmon, Pauley Perrette and Skye P Marshall star

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A bystander is killed in a robbery, traumatising his mentally ill wife, who is later suspected of physically abusing their child. The police take the youngster into protective custody, but a lack of evidence forces them to return him home - with tragic consequences. Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a teenage girl is found in the boot of a car, and inquiries soon establish she was a bully who enjoyed picking on other girls - leaving Stabler and Benson with a seemingly endless list of suspects to choose from. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An eminent forensic psychiatrist is found beaten up and left for dead in a drug den. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cabot investigates the rape and murder of an undercover federal agent, but receives death threats as the case proceeds toward trial. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An actress is found hanged in her New York apartment, but with her career on the rise and a loving husband supporting her, Green and Cassady are determined to prove the death was not the suicide it appears to be. Crime drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Milena Govich

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The ex-wife of a respected former senator is found murdered in her home, and Green and Cassady's inquiries lead them to a dysfunctional family with a number of strange secrets. programme.desc: Detectives Briscoe and Logan face a race against time to catch a serial killer carrying out a series of racially motivated murders. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Christopher Noth

Award-winning police drama, starring Sam Waterston

Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teenager beats a fellow foster home resident to death, and his lawyer seeks a not guilty vedict, claiming the youth is genetically predisposed to violent behaviour because he possesses an extra Y chromosome

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant dies of ricin poisoning and the detectives' inquiries link him and his brother to a prostitution ring trafficking young women into New York. A police officer whose daughter was among the girls is the main suspect, but Green and Cassady face difficulties with the Russian consulate

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the abduction and murder of a child, following a lead to a suspected serial paedophile, who is found holding another boy captive. However, the youngster seems to be more than just an innocent victim. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: NCIS

Meanwhile, Mossad agent Ziva David returns as a replacement for Kate, much to Gibbs's displeasure. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A doctor takes a paternity test that could prove his guilt in the murders of a mother and her baby. The procedure appears to prove he is not the father - but does implicate him in several child molestation cases. Hard-hitting drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Novak intervenes to ensure his professional survival - and in return asks him to conduct an investigation at a secure psychiatric unit. Crime drama, guest starring Leland Orser

programme.desc: An unidentified woman found dead in an alleyway appears to have taken a heroin overdose, but further inspection reveals someone may have had a hand in administering the fatal drugs. Sam Waterson, Elisabeth Rohm and Jerry Orbach star

programme.desc: A worker at a meat-packing plant is killed in the workplace, prompting Logan and Briscoe to turn their attention to the man's disgruntled Russian bride. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cyrus Lupo returns to New York after four years abroad. He and Green investigate two suicides that seem to be linked, and the detectives become suspicious of a parolee known as Dr Death. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine who appears to have been leading a double life is shot dead. As the investigation continues, however, the team uncovers a case of identity theft - together with a tangled motive involving a mysterious package and a wronged wife. Drama, starring Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a marine's wife is shown live on the internet and inquiries point to two housewives who were running their own pornographic website, but have since vanished. The search for the missing pair begins with the website administrator - and ends with a surprising discovery

programme.desc: A vengeful loan shark kidnaps the family of a financier who owes him money. Unfortunately, Goren and Eames have a tough time proving that an abduction has even taken place, chiefly because the terrified man has been told his daughters will be killed if he talks

programme.desc: An assistant district attorney is found strangled in his car in an area notorious for prostitution. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man is arrested for assaulting his alcoholic wife, who is pregnant - but changes the focus of the case by trying to have her charged with neglect for drinking while expecting a baby. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Adam witnesses a murder on a video chat website, and the team races to the victim's apartment, where a search reveals a significant clue - her laptop has gone missing. Crime drama, starring AJ Buckley, Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell scour the antiques shops around Sheffield to find something that will give them the edge at the auction. Natasha goes out of her comfort zone when considering some 18th-century pottery, but feels more at home when she spots something from the 1970s. Philip opts for some typically 'Serrell' items, as well as chewing over more prehistoric stuff. He also goes out of his way to prove that chivalry isn't dead. On the road, Philip visits a factory using the world-famous Sheffield steel to make some very fine tools, and Natasha heads to the woods for a spot of foraging and some free food. It's going to be a nail biter at their final auction at Lytham St Annes, Lancashire

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Merlin

programme.title: Brit Cops

programme.desc: A distressed teenager explores cures for hair-loss, and a professional singer tries to save her career by learning to control her severe acid reflux. A mother fears her six-year-old son will be a target for bullying because of his psoriasis, and doctors help an obese father reverse damage done to his liver

programme.title: Joy Division (2008)
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of the 1970s rock band. The film examines the influence of their Manchester roots on their music, their impact on the post-punk scene and the suicide of lead Singer Ian Curtis. Featuring contributions from surviving band members and archive interviews with John Peel and Tony Wilson

programme.title: Sophie's Choice (1982)
programme.desc: A Polish Holocaust survivor tries to start afresh in 1940s New York, but is tormented by ghosts from her nightmarish past, leaving her desperately seeking solace in a stormy relationship with an unpredictable chemist. But all is not as it seems, as a new neighbour seems set to discover. Drama, starring an Oscar-winning Meryl Streep alongside Kevin Kline and Peter MacNicol

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Martha represents a teenager accused of having sex in a popular park, but is furious to discover he has misled her about the circumstances surrounding the case - and later realises the arresting officer may be lying. Meanwhile, Clive keeps a close eye on Niamh and Nick as they defend two dog owners charged with possessing dangerous animals. Legal drama, starring Maxine Peake

programme.title: This That and the Other (1970)
programme.desc: Anthology of three comic tales. A fading movie star tries to seduce a producer, a suicidal loner is snapped out of his misery by a hippy, and a taxi driver suffers a blow to the head that leaves him experiencing erotic hallucinations. Comedy, starring Victor Spinetti, Dennis Waterman, Vanda Hudson and John Bird

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach arrives in Barcelona, where everyone goes sightseeing and tries their hand at paella-making. Meanwhile, two of the male passengers compete for the affections of fellow traveller Lisa, and new arrivals cause a stir when they climb on board

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Featuring inspirational walks from around Britain

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Bertie and Zigby set off to see the baby turtles hatching on Savannah Beach, but McMee keeps falling asleep, making their journey very difficult

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Clem gets a case of the hiccups, and involuntarily starts to change colour

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Vicky paints a portrait of Celine as a gift for her birthday

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: Zara wants her pet caterpillar to perform in a special circus

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The excitable zebra encourages everyone to share their belongings, but the scheme does not go as planned

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra organises a game of coconut scoop, and the prize is a delicious fruit

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby takes over Ylvi's treehouse and will not let her in. Vic comes up with a plan to scare him away, but it goes badly wrong

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The king wants to demolish the village and build a palace on the site, leaving the vikings homeless

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Ylva competes against Baltak's wife in a baking contest - and they are both send their husbands on a quest to find a very rare ingredient

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar and Vic go in search of a magic sword, unaware that an evil warlord plans to steal it from them once they have it

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar challenges Sven to a fight, confident his invincible sword will guarantee him victory. However, Vic fears his father may be in over his head

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: The vikings put on a play inspired by a story about the Norse gods Odin, Thor and Loki for a festival

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps Wiltshire couple and pop opera fanatics Nikki Kedge and Angela Rawson find a bigger home in their dream location of Scotland's west coast. Desperate for more room to put on plays for local children, they view six houses in the county of Dumfries and Galloway - but will there be anything that tickles their fancy?

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A distressed teenager explores cures for hair-loss, and a professional singer tries to save her career by learning to control her severe acid reflux. A mother fears her six-year-old son will be a target for bullying because of his psoriasis, and doctors help an obese father reverse damage done to his liver

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Dermot and Gary get serious over a chess contest in which the victor gains an evening of pleasure. Laddish comedy, starring Martin Clunes and Leslie Ash

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court

programme.title: I Was a Spy (1933)
programme.desc: A Belgian nurse infiltrates German High Command to supply the British with vital information during the First World War One. Fact-based spy thriller, starring Madeleine Carroll, Conrad Veidt, Donald Calthorp and Nigel Bruce

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Exploring the districts of Woolwich, Plumstead and Deptford

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Individuals take up the challenge to reinvent themselves completely

programme.title: Callan
programme.desc: Spy drama, starring Edward Woodward as an embittered secret agent

programme.title: Britain's Favourite Supermarket Foods
programme.desc: Cherry Healey presents the second of two programmes in which she explores the unexpected positive health benefits of everyday foods. Here she learns about the brain-boosting capabilities of the humble berry, testing it out on a group of students to see whether it aids their concentration, and reveals the daily staples that can help with everything from the heart to the teeth

programme.title: Silk
programme.desc: Martha represents a teenager accused of having sex in a popular park, but is furious to discover he has misled her about the circumstances surrounding the case - and later realises the arresting officer may be lying. Meanwhile, Clive keeps a close eye on Niamh and Nick as they defend two dog owners charged with possessing dangerous animals. Legal drama, starring Maxine Peake

programme.title: Six Rounds
programme.desc: Among the 2011 London riots, a former boxer, must choose between his lower-class past plagued by crime or a new love and future in a middle-class society that he does not fit into

programme.title: Damage (1992)
programme.desc: An English politician at the height of his career risks everything he holds dear when he gives in to his impulses and recklessly embarks on a passionate relationship with his son's girlfriend. When news of the affair reaches Whitehall, the fallout looks set to end his political ambitions. Drama, starring Jeremy Irons, Juliette Binoche, Rupert Graves, and Miranda Richardson

programme.title: Melancholia (1989)
programme.desc: A jaded German ex-pat living in London is confronted by his past as a member of a far-left radical group when he's asked to assassinate a Chilean murderer who is visiting London. Drama, starring Jeroen Krabbe and Susannah York

programme.title: Fox
programme.desc: Drama following the lives of a London gangster and his family. Starring Peter Vaughan, Ray Winstone and Bernard Hill. Originally broadcast in 1980

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the comedy. Gary and Dermot worry about who will moving into the newly vacant flat above them, but their fears prove unfounded when it turns out to be an attractive blonde

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett selects memorable moments from the house-hunting series as she returns to some of her favourite locations. From Woolacombe to Whitby, and Margate to the Isle of Wight, the retrospective illustrates why the English coastline has become the latest property hotspot

programme.title: Ringside Special
programme.desc: An interview with former two-time world heavyweight champion Larry Holmes, whose professional career began in 1973 and ended in 2002. Holmes was known for his superior jab, widely considered to be one the most effective in the history of the sport, which helped him make 20 successful defences of the world title, which was second only to Joe Louis in the heavyweight division

programme.title: Fight Night
programme.desc: George Groves v Andrea Di Luisa. Another chance to see the bout for the vacant WBC International Super Middleweight title at the Copper Box in London. Home favourite Groves will have been hoping to bounce back immediately following his split-decision loss to Badou Jack for the WBC World title, which took place in September on the undercard of Floyd Mayweather Jr v Andre Berto in Las Vegas. A convincing win over Italian opponent Di Luisa would put Groves back on track for a fourth world title shot - potentially versus his old foe James DeGale, who holds the IBF belt
